part1.title: 動詞變化練習

part3.title: Frequency Adverbs
part3.desc: alawys / usually / often / sometimes / never 頻率副詞的用法

segments.text: I [1] wake up at seven o'clock because I don't want to be late for school. I [2] eat bread for breakfast, but today I want noodles instead. I [3] run to school because the school is very close to my house.
